DEFAULT_ENTROPY: 32

=== token_bytes ===
default type: bytes
default len: 32
16 type: bytes
16 len: 16
0 len: 0
0 type: bytes
negative error: negative argument not allowed

=== token_hex ===
default type: str
default len: 64
8 len: 16
all hex chars: True
negative error: negative argument not allowed

=== token_urlsafe ===
default type: str
default len: 43
16 len: 22
64 len: 86
all urlsafe: True
negative error: negative argument not allowed

=== randbelow ===
randbelow(10) in range: True
randbelow(1): 0
large in range: True
randbelow(0) error: Upper bound must be positive.
randbelow(-5) error: Upper bound must be positive.

=== randbits ===
randbits(0): 0
randbits(8) in range: True
randbits(16) in range: True
randbits(1) in range: True
randbits(-1) error: number of bits must be non-negative

=== choice ===
choice(list) always in seq: True
choice(str) always in str: True
choice(tuple) in tuple: True
choice([]) IndexError: Cannot choose from an empty sequence

=== compare_digest ===
bytes equal: True
bytes unequal: False
str equal: True
str unequal: False
empty equal: True
empty unequal: False
